input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule EV.5.7.3 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ev.5.7.3
            TITLE: the control signal which closes the airs must not control the voltage indicator

            CONTENT:
            rule EV.5.7.3: The control signal which closes the AIRs must not control the Voltage Indicator
EV.5.7.3 The control signal which closes the AIRs must not control the Voltage Indicator

final_answer: The control signal which closes the AIRs must not control the Voltage Indicator
